gain_notes: Signal chain: Behringer PRO-800 → Mackie 1402 VLZ → Steinberg UR22 (USB) → Windows → Audacity. Recorded mono 48 kHz. Gain staged nominally ~0 dB (no intentional boost); trim as set on mixer/interface for clean level without clipping.
notes: Merged from New folder; run trim_renders.py then set gain_notes/firmware.
